visuals.title: Linear Regression Line Fitting
visuals.description: Scatter plot showing data points with fitted regression line and residuals (vertical distances from points to line).

visuals.title: Gradient Descent on Cost Surface
visuals.description: Contour plot showing how gradient descent navigates the cost function to find optimal weights.

visuals.title: Ridge vs Lasso Regularization
visuals.description: Comparison showing how L1 (Lasso) creates sparse solutions while L2 (Ridge) shrinks weights uniformly.
